def: A compound containing a relatively large amount of carbon. [R.]
The quality or state of being viscid; also, that which isviscid; glutinous concretion; stickiness.
A kind of spar; earth flax, or amianthus. [Obs.] oodward.

A scarf or band worn about the waist, over the shoulder, orotherwise; a belt; a girdle, -- worn by women and children as anornament; also worn as a badge of distinction by military officers,members of societies, etc.
The quality or state of being plain.
Any plant of a genus (Eriocaulon) of aquatic or marsh herbswith soft grass-like leaves.
One who studies, or is versed in, conchology.
